feature: Job Control CLI Commands (retry, kill, logs) - Verification
workflow_rationale: All three commands are already fully implemented with comprehensive tests. This is a verification task to ensure the implementation meets spec requirements and make check passes.

phases.name: Verification and Testing
phases.description: Verify existing implementations meet spec requirements and all tests pass

subtasks.description: Verify bop retry command exists and works correctly
subtasks.notes: Verified 14 retry tests passing (8 unit tests in cards::tests + 6 integration tests in job_control_harness). All tests pass successfully. Implementation confirmed at crates/bop-cli/src/cards.rs:511-565. Tests cover all edge cases: failed->pending move, retry count increment, failure reason clearing, stage normalization, rejection of pending/running cards.

subtasks.description: Verify bop kill command exists and works correctly
subtasks.notes: Verified bop kill command is fully functional. Function exists at line 569 in crates/bop-cli/src/cards.rs. Implementation includes: card state validation (must be running), PID reading via reaper::read_pid, process liveness check, SIGTERM sending, meta update with failure_reason='killed', lineage event logging, card movement to failed/ directory. All 4 tests passing in job_control_harness.rs: kill_fails_when_card_not_running, kill_fails_when_card_not_found, kill_sends_sigterm_and_moves_to_failed, kill_handles_stale_pid_and_moves_to_failed. CLI help properly documents command.

subtasks.description: Verify bop logs command exists and works correctly

verification.command: cargo run --release -- logs --help 2>&1 | grep -q 'Stream stdout and stderr'
verification.expected: Help text shows logs command with --follow option

subtasks.notes: Verified bop logs command is fully functional. Help text shows 'Stream stdout and stderr logs for a card' with --follow option working correctly. Implementation at crates/bop-cli/src/logs.rs includes: colorized output for errors/warnings/state transitions, TTY detection, follow mode that streams new bytes every 200ms, automatic stop when card leaves running/, support for both stdout.log and stderr.log, proper handling of missing/rotated log files.

verification.instructions: Determine root cause of test failure. This test is UNRELATED to retry/kill/logs commands.

subtasks.notes: Test now passing - was already fixed. All 10 dispatcher_harness tests pass successfully.

subtasks.description: Ensure make check passes (or document acceptable failures)

verification.expected: All tests pass, clippy passes, rustfmt passes

subtasks.notes: Fixed clippy warnings: removed unused run() function, changed &PathBuf to &Path, moved const assertions to const blocks, used struct initialization. All tests pass single-threaded (428 tests). Clippy and rustfmt pass. Documented test parallelism flakiness in test-parallelism-notes.md - tests exhibit race conditions when run in parallel but are reliable when run single-threaded with --jobs 1 --test-threads=1.

verification_strategy.reasoning: Commands are already implemented. This is a verification task to ensure they meet spec requirements.
acceptance_criteria: bop retry <id> command works and moves failed cards to pending
bop kill <id> command works and sends SIGTERM to running agent
bop logs <id> command works and streams logs
bop logs <id> --follow works and tails live logs
make check passes (or unrelated failures are documented)

verification_steps.name: Test bop commands manually
verification_steps.expected_outcome: All three commands appear in help output

steps: Verify bop retry --help shows command documentation
Verify bop kill --help shows command documentation
Verify bop logs --help shows command documentation with --follow option
